mapper.select: SELECT s.*, p.space_name as parent_name, c.space_name as campus_name, b.space_name as building_name, b.building_no as parent_building_no FROM space s LEFT JOIN space p ON s.parent_id = p.id AND p.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN space c ON s.campus_id = c.id AND c.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN space b ON s.building_id = b.id AND b.deleted = 0 WHERE s.id = #{id} AND s.deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM space WHERE space_code = #{spaceCode} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM space WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY space_code
SELECT * FROM space WHERE space_type = 'CAMPUS' AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY space_code
SELECT * FROM space WHERE building_id = #{buildingId} AND space_type = 'FLOOR' AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY floor_number
SELECT * FROM space WHERE path LIKE CONCAT(#{pathPrefix}, '%') AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY path
SELECT * FROM space WHERE org_unit_id = #{orgUnitId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY path
mapper.update: UPDATE space SET current_occupancy = #{occupancy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM space WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND deleted = 0

SELECT * FROM space WHERE id IN ( SELECT CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(#{path}, '/', numbers.n), '/', -1) AS UNSIGNED) as ancestor_id FROM ( SELECT 1 n UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9 UNION SELECT 10 ) numbers WHERE CHAR_LENGTH(#{path}) - CHAR_LENGTH(REPLACE(#{path}, '/', '')) >= numbers.n ) AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY level

SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN space_type = 'FLOOR' THEN 1 END) as floor_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN space_type = 'ROOM' THEN 1 END) as room_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN space_type = 'ROOM' THEN capacity ELSE 0 END), 0) as total_capacity, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN space_type = 'ROOM' THEN current_occupancy ELSE 0 END), 0) as total_occupancy FROM space WHERE building_id = #{buildingId} AND deleted = 0
